prompt: A bamboo forest with tall dense bamboo stalks rising on both sides of a narrow stone-paved path. Misty light filters through the bamboo canopy. A stone lantern stands on the right side of the path. The path disappears ahead into bamboo-veiled mist. Monochrome ink-wash atmosphere in pure black and white tones. Further ahead, the path crosses a small arched stone bridge over a narrow stream trickling through mossy rocks. Behind the viewer, the path leads back to a wooden gate with a thatched roof marking the forest entrance, flanked by two more stone lanterns. First-person viewer. First-person view with both hands holding a katana in a forward guard stance, the polished blade extending ahead and reflecting bamboo shadows.

tracking_object.desc: stone lantern on the right side of the path
